generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Critics say we're bearing too much burden, but the truth is our partners bring unique capabilities we can't afford to lose. Remember the Baltic air policing missions? Those were only possible because of shared commitment. We can't afford to weaken these bonds. #StrongerTogether #NATOWorks
